text: Monoliths tangle. Microservices complicate. There's a better way.
Mark a class with Module, and the Roslyn generator wires it up at compile time.
Write one IEndpoint class. Routes and permissions register themselves.
MapCrud turns a single line into five REST endpoints.
Render React pages with Inertia, and broadcast events across modules.
Ten production-ready core modules ship in the box.
Built on .NET 10 and React 19, with fifty-five compile-time safety checks.
Start building today. You'll find us on GitHub.
